description: Privacy-first, unofficial Oura MCP server for AI health, sleep, activity and heart-rate agents.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/ouramcp

environmentVariables.description: Oura OAuth client ID. Optional when configured with oura-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: OURA_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Oura OAuth client secret. Prefer oura-mcp-server setup so this secret is stored in ~/.oura-mcp/config.json instead of MCP client config.
environmentVariables.name: OURA_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Redirect URI configured in the Oura Developer Dashboard. Optional when configured with oura-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: OURA_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: Optional local path for OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.oura-mcp/tokens.json.
environmentVariables.name: OURA_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured. raw means full Oura API payloads, not continuous 24/7 raw sensor telemetry.
environmentVariables.name: OURA_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.
environmentVariables.name: OURA_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Optional local SQLite cache path. Defaults to ~/.oura-mcp/cache.sqlite.
environmentVariables.name: OURA_CACHE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to bypass the in-memory HTTP response cache (60s TTL for GET only). POST/PUT/DELETE and 4xx/5xx responses are never cached regardless.
environmentVariables.name: OURA_NO_CACHE
